ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "waist_coat_size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "chest_range" TEXT /* Chest measurement range in cm */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Waist measurement range in cm */,
  "shoulder_cm" INTEGER /* Shoulder width in cm */,
  "length_cm" INTEGER /* Length of the garment in cm */,
  "hip_range" TEXT /* Hip measurement range in cm */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" INTEGER /* Sleeve length in cm */,
  "inseam_length_cm" INTEGER /* Inseam length in cm */,
  "neck_size_cm" INTEGER /* Neck size in cm */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* A more descriptive label for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the category is intended */,
  "recommended_season" TEXT /* Season for which the category is recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the product model was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size for the customer */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred category for the customer */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Status of the order's shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory audit */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being audited */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change */,
  "change_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of stock changed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the inventory location */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the inventory audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audit_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Supplier's address */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for supplier-product relationship */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product supplied */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the product from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered during the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the promotion applies to */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "fit_accuracy" TEXT /* Feedback on the fit accuracy */,
  "fit_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on fit and sizing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of clothing */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of clothing */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the specified category and size */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of items sold */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the products in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
